title: Integration

visual_sequence.observation: Boundary integrals and interior derivatives are paired.
Different paths test exactness and path independence.
A potential turns line integrals into endpoint differences.
Boundary orientation is the accounting device.
A closed form on a punctured domain can have nonzero period.
